suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit documentation-only execution branch clarifying that TDD-first test authoring is not required for pure docs/design features while still requiring baseline and final regression validator runs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both developer-workflow-guide and private-ledger-design-doc handoffs reported TDD-first deviations because the features were documentation-only and introduced no runtime behavior changes.
